falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes below 4000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Would indicate a breakdown below key support levels, contradicting the pattern's implied bullish reversal
Suggests extreme market stress and acceleration, invalidating the HOLD signal's implied stability

falsification_conditions.condition: Major central bank (e.g., Fed) announces $50B+ liquidity injection in a single week
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Would create artificial market conditions inconsistent with natural pattern formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
